name: Torch-Points3D
description: A comprehensive PyTorch framework for deep learning research on point cloud data. Provides tools for implementing and benchmarking state-of-the-art models across multiple 3D analysis tasks including classification, segmentation, object detection, panoptic segmentation, and registration. Features pre-built implementations of PointNet, PointNet++, KPConv, RandLA-Net, VoteNet, and other models with support for sparse convolution backends like MinkowskiEngine and TorchSparse.
